title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: India has changed its startup rules for deep tech
items.description: India is adjusting startup rules to help more of its deep tech startups with funding and long-term success.

items.title: The kids ‘picked last in gym class’ gear up for Super Bowl
items.description: YouTube CEO Neal Mohan is expected to be there. Apple's Tim Cook, too.

items.title: NBA star Giannis Antetokounmpo joins Kalshi as an investor
items.description: Antetokounmpo is the first NBA player to directly invest in Kalshi.

items.title: The Technologies Changing How You’ll Watch the 2026 Winter Olympic Games
items.description: From drones with “first-person” visualization to real-time 360-degree replays and Olympics GPT, get ready to immerse yourself in the Winter Games in M...

items.title: 4 Best Website Builders (2026), Tested and Reviewed
items.description: Don't fuss around with files and servers. Just use one of these WIRED-tested website builders.

items.title: Target Darts Omni Auto Scoring System Hits the Mark
items.description: Step up to the oche and hit the bull’s-eye with this automatic darts scoring system for online play.

items.title: Sony's Biggest QLED Screens See Big Discounts This Weekend
items.description: You can grab a lower price on some of Sony's biggest QLED panels.

items.title: The 7 Best Automatic Litter Boxes (2025) Our Cats Would Recommend
items.description: With these high-tech automatic litter boxes, gone are the days of scooping and smells. Welcome to the future.

items.title: New York lawmakers propose a three-year pause on new data centers
items.description: Although the bill’s prospects are uncertain, New York is at least the sixth state to consider pausing construction of new data centers.

items.title: Benchmark raises $225M in special funds to double down on Cerebras
items.description: Benchmark Capital has been an investor in the Nvidia rival since 2016.
